title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIT Delhi

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIT Delhi
jsonLd.description:
IIT Delhi, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Delhi:
IIT Delhi is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Delhi!
